title: Move leaking telemetry attach from perform/1 to application.ex
prompt: The worker in `test_fixtures/telemetry_bad_handler.ex` attaches a new telemetry handler inside `perform/1` on every execution, leaking handlers indefinitely. Also it uses the wrong event name `[:oban, :worker, :exception]`. Rewrite: (1) remove the attach from `perform/1`, (2) move a single `:telemetry.attach_many/4` call to `MyApp.Application.start/2`, (3) use the correct event `[:oban, :job, :exception]`, (4) the handler is in `MyApp.ObanHandler` module. perform/1 should remain minimal: load the report and generate it. Write both files: `lib/my_app/workers/report_worker.ex` and `lib/my_app/application.ex`.
tier_rationale: Two bugs (leak + wrong event name) in one file, fix requires touching two files. Sonnet often fixes one and misses the other.
